case_title: HENRY TANG VS. JOSE MARNAL et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $37.00 SERVED JUN-02-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARNAL, JOSE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT.PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY KENNETH CHAN - FARMERS INSURANCE NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. FIOL. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO FARMERS INSURANCE, INC. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-25-2014 AT 8:30 AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANG, HENRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARNAL, JOSE $857.57 PRINCIPAL, $117.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $974.57, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST FARMERS INC. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
